name: manga-realtime-translator
description: Chrome MV3 extension that overlays Thai translations on manga/manhwa/manhua as you scroll, using a Vision LLM via OpenRouter with two-layer caching and a user-drawn translation scope.

scripts.test: esbuild tests/unit.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=tests/_unit.mjs && node tests/_unit.mjs && esbuild tests/live.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=tests/_live.mjs && node tests/_live.mjs
